name: Beef Jerky#5
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Round, Chuck Steak Or Chuck Roast (up to)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the spices in a dish.
2. Cut the meat into strips less than 1/4 inch thick.
3. Remove all fat from the meat strips.
4. Sprinkle one side of each strip with the combined seasonings.
5. Beat the seasoned side with a meat hammer until evenly coated.
6. Turn the strips over and repeat steps 4 and 5 on the other side.
7. Place the strips on a cookie sheet or other flat pan.
8. Set the oven to 120°F (49°C) and place the strips inside.
9. Cook for 4 hours, then turn the strips and return them to the oven for another 4 hours.
10. Keep the oven door slightly propped open to allow moisture to escape.
11. Store the jerky in a plastic bag once cooled.
